title: CME Restarts Gas and Metals Futures Trading After Glitch
description: Trading in US natural gas futures was halted for more than half an hour on Wednesday, the second major disruption in a month in one of the most heavily traded commodity markets. Metals contracts were also affected.
content: Trading in US natural gas futures was halted for more than half an hour on Wednesday, the second major disruption in a month in one of the most heavily traded commodity markets. Metals contracts were also affected.
